title: Phenotypic analysis of circulating leukocytes
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"v5eb","text":"Antibody panels for flow cytometry were prepared with specific antibodies for identification of lymphocyte populations, and antibodies specific to IL-23 receptor andIL-12 receptorβeta-2 subunit.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fphoq","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"47c03","text":"Single stains were used for compensation controls and fluorescence minus one (FMO) controls were used to help set gates for flow cytometry.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"cul3o","text":"PBA = phosphate buffered saline or PBS containing 1.5% bovine serum albumin and 0.02% sodium azide","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cnt53","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3qvtd","text":"LIVE/DEAD Fixable Aqua dead cell stain purchased from Molecular Probes,Leiden, The Netherlands.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":71,"length":24}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bkl2f","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"11lu6","text":"Fluorochrome-conjugated monoclonal antibodies:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"96man","text":"CD3 (clone REA613, BW264/56), CD4 (REA623), CD8 (BW135/80, REA734), CD14 (REA599, TÜK4), CD16 (REA423), CD25 (4E3), CD45RA (REA562), CD127 (REA614), CD197 (CCR7; REA546), HLA-DR (REA805), IL-12Rβ2 (REA333) and IL-23R (218213) (purchased from Miltenyi Biotec, Gladbach Bergische, Germany and R\u0026D Systems, Abingdon, UK).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5olq9","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"42qts","text":"Optimal quantities to give full staining with minimal amount of each antibody were determnined for each vial to ensure optimal results prior to calculation of volume needed. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6td0n","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"a246c","text":"Cocktails of up to 8 mAbs were made up in PBA buffer.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1r0qh","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cm7ug","text":"BD FACS CANTO II flow cytometer","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Acquire blood sample from patient - 3mls EDTA
Transfer 100mcl whole blood to each FACS tube (7 tubes per patient)
Add Dead Cell Stain into each tube except tube 7 (unstained), vortex, and incubate for 15 minutes in the dark
Resuspend with appropriate antibody cocktail (50mcl per tube) into each tube except 7 (unstained), vortex, and incubate for 15 minutes
Add 1ml BD FACS lysing solution, vortex, and incubate for 15 minutes in the dark
Add 1ml PBA and spin down at 1500RPM for 7 minutes. DIscard supernatants
Resuspend in 2mls PBA, vortex, and spin and discard as per step 6
Resuspend cells in few drops of PBA, vortex, keep cool, and acquire by flow cytometer immediately
Wash with PBA, vortex, and spin down at 1500RPM for 7 minutes
creator: John Davis Coakley
